title: melhania × benjaminii
intro: Melhania × benjaminii, also known as Indian Tinospora or Guduchi, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Passifloraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, stress, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as improved digestion, enhanced cognitive function, and boosted energy levels. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
